ideation: This sequence simulates the motion of a person climbing.  The left arm will pull upward, then the right will follow in a coordinated motion.  The final frame will show both arms reaching upwards. I'll use a 3-frame animation to keep it concise and impactful. Frame 1 will show the starting position, frame 2 the left arm pulling, and frame 3 both arms reaching. I'll ensure the movements are smooth and realistic, given the robot's joint limitations.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to ascend
left arm pulls up, reaching for the next hold
both arms stretch high, conquering the climb
